text:
<%me>！
さっすがー！　ちゃんと見てたよ！

惑星ハルコタンって
ぜんっぜん違う文化なのね。
見てて面白かったわよ。

とりあえずSランククリア
おつかれさま！
見応えある探索だったわよ！

<%me>!
I knew you could pull it off!
I saw the whole thing!

Harukotan really has a whole different culture,
huh? I had fun seeing it.

Anyways, congrats on getting S Rank!
That was some pretty impressive exploring!
